name: Wand of Pernicious Poison (Purple Worm Sting)
description:
This wand is made of chitin, topped with a hooked barb that weeps droplets of foul-smelling, green fluid when you Activate the wand.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast . The poison the spell delivers gains the virulent trait.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of .
